title: ICAT is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)

jsonLd.title: ICAT is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
ICAT, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Subject Matter Expert for our Agra operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About ICAT:
ICAT is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Support students with special educational needs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Educational Technology

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICAT!
